content:textarea:2:29.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:2:29.html: We have successfully raised $14 million towards our Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives shelter renovation project. However, we cannot break ground until we reach our goal of raising the remaining $2.5 million. Help us provide a place for Greenville families to get back on their feet. Make a pledge today!
content:textarea:2:29.content: We have successfully raised $14 million towards our Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives shelter renovation project. However, we cannot break ground until we reach our goal of raising the remaining $2.5 million. Help us provide a place for Greenville families to get back on their feet. Make a pledge today!

content:textarea:11:53.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:11:53.html: For those on the streets, it’s not just the cold, heat, or even the hunger, but the weight of uncertainty.
content:textarea:11:53.content: For those on the streets, it’s not just the cold, heat, or even the hunger, but the weight of uncertainty.

content:textarea:12:79.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:12:79.html: Waking up each morning unsure of where you will lay your head, if you’ll eat, or how you’ll care for your children. Wondering if you have the strength to take another step.
content:textarea:12:79.content: Waking up each morning unsure of where you will lay your head, if you’ll eat, or how you’ll care for your children. Wondering if you have the strength to take another step.

content:textarea:13:63.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:13:63.html: It’s a daily struggle, filled with unimaginable stress—a burden no person should have to carry alone.
content:textarea:13:63.content: It’s a daily struggle, filled with unimaginable stress—a burden no person should have to carry alone.

content:textarea:16:54.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:16:54.html: In Greenville County, homelessness has a face that may surprise you. It’s often who you least expect. It could be a child in your son’s classroom, a woman you pass in the grocery store, or a veteran who once served our country. For some, all it takes is a lost job, an unexpected illness, or a past mistake to end up on the streets.
content:textarea:16:54.content: In Greenville County, homelessness has a face that may surprise you. It’s often who you least expect. It could be a child in your son’s classroom, a woman you pass in the grocery store, or a veteran who once served our country. For some, all it takes is a lost job, an unexpected illness, or a past mistake to end up on the streets.

content:textarea:17:37.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:17:37.html: Last year alone, 4,100 people experienced homelessness in Greenville (a 19.9 percent increase over three years).
content:textarea:17:37.content: Last year alone, 4,100 people experienced homelessness in Greenville (a 19.9 percent increase over three years).

content:wysiwyg_basic:19:76.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:19:76.html:
• 1 in 3 was a woman
  • 1 in 2 had a disability
  • 1 in 8 was a child
  • 1 in 17 was a veteran
content:wysiwyg_basic:19:76.content:
• 1 in 3 was a woman
  • 1 in 2 had a disability
  • 1 in 8 was a child
  • 1 in 17 was a veteran

content:textarea:20:65.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:20:65.html: These statistics are a clear signal that our neighbors are in trouble.
content:textarea:20:65.content: These statistics are a clear signal that our neighbors are in trouble.

content:textarea:21:96.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:21:96.html: At The Salvation Army of Greenville County, our shelters are always at full capacity. Every week, we face the painful reality of turning people away—each one a person in desperate need of safety, stability, and hope. And the pressures are only growing. Rapid inflation is forcing many families to choose between food, medicine, and housing.
content:textarea:21:96.content: At The Salvation Army of Greenville County, our shelters are always at full capacity. Every week, we face the painful reality of turning people away—each one a person in desperate need of safety, stability, and hope. And the pressures are only growing. Rapid inflation is forcing many families to choose between food, medicine, and housing.

content:textarea:24:94.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:24:94.html: The lives of our neighbors hang in the balance.
content:textarea:24:94.content: The lives of our neighbors hang in the balance.

content:images:26:5.name: Image

content:textarea:27:26.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:27:26.html: Felicia Collins Robbins has a deep personal connection to The Salvation Army’s mission.
content:textarea:27:26.content: Felicia Collins Robbins has a deep personal connection to The Salvation Army’s mission.

content:textarea:28:15.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:28:15.html: Her father’s life was dramatically shaped by the organization after he lost his mother at a young age. Fred Collins was taken in by the orphanage operated by The Salvation Army. He lived there experiencing a loving, nurturing environment until he was reunited with his father.
content:textarea:28:15.content: Her father’s life was dramatically shaped by the organization after he lost his mother at a young age. Fred Collins was taken in by the orphanage operated by The Salvation Army. He lived there experiencing a loving, nurturing environment until he was reunited with his father.

content:textarea:29:63.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:29:63.html: “My dad credits The Salvation Army with learning about the love of God,” Felicia said. “I don’t know what my life would have been like if it hadn’t been for The Salvation Army.”
content:textarea:29:63.content: “My dad credits The Salvation Army with learning about the love of God,” Felicia said. “I don’t know what my life would have been like if it hadn’t been for The Salvation Army.”

content:textarea:30:46.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:30:46.html: Her father’s journey—from facing hardships during his youth to becoming a successful businessman—serves as a testament to the power of The Salvation Army’s support.
content:textarea:30:46.content: Her father’s journey—from facing hardships during his youth to becoming a successful businessman—serves as a testament to the power of The Salvation Army’s support.

content:textarea:31:64.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:31:64.html: “My dad went from living on the wrong side of the tracks and living in an orphanage to establishing a foundation to help charities in our region,” she said.
content:textarea:31:64.content: “My dad went from living on the wrong side of the tracks and living in an orphanage to establishing a foundation to help charities in our region,” she said.

content:textarea:32:45.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:32:45.html: Like her father, Felicia believes that everyone deserves the chance to succeed, regardless of their circumstances.
content:textarea:32:45.content: Like her father, Felicia believes that everyone deserves the chance to succeed, regardless of their circumstances.

content:textarea:33:56.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:33:56.html: “You don’t know what an individual can become if they have the right resources,” she said.
content:textarea:33:56.content: “You don’t know what an individual can become if they have the right resources,” she said.

content:textarea:34:79.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:34:79.html: Through her leadership in the Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign, she is helping ensure that others have the same opportunity her father did.
content:textarea:34:79.content: Through her leadership in the Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign, she is helping ensure that others have the same opportunity her father did.

content:textarea:35:71.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:35:71.html: “Your gift to this campaign is not just for the here and now,” she said. “You will help individuals and entire families. Your generosity will touch generations.”
content:textarea:35:71.content: “Your gift to this campaign is not just for the here and now,” she said. “You will help individuals and entire families. Your generosity will touch generations.”

content:text:39:31.name: Heading
content:text:39:31.html: Championing Hope for Families in Crisis
content:text:39:31.content: Championing Hope for Families in Crisis

content:textarea:40:98.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:40:98.html: As a retired commercial banking executive, Earle Harding brings a wealth of experience in financial stewardship. And for more than two decades, he has been consistently impressed with The Salvation Army Greenville County’s strong track record of fiscal responsibility.
content:textarea:40:98.content: As a retired commercial banking executive, Earle Harding brings a wealth of experience in financial stewardship. And for more than two decades, he has been consistently impressed with The Salvation Army Greenville County’s strong track record of fiscal responsibility.

content:textarea:41:2.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:41:2.html: “Everything they bring in the door locally gets spent locally,” Earle said. “They are incredibly efficient with every dollar raised.”
content:textarea:41:2.content: “Everything they bring in the door locally gets spent locally,” Earle said. “They are incredibly efficient with every dollar raised.”

content:textarea:42:32.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:42:32.html: Recently, during a tour of the current facility, his commitment to the mission deepened. As he stood in the hallway of the women and children’s shelter, a distraught woman rushed in, panic in her eyes.
content:textarea:42:32.content: Recently, during a tour of the current facility, his commitment to the mission deepened. As he stood in the hallway of the women and children’s shelter, a distraught woman rushed in, panic in her eyes.

content:textarea:43:26.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:43:26.html: “She was terrified,” Earle recalled. “I personally have never experienced that kind of fear. The look on her face has really stayed with me.”
content:textarea:43:26.content: “She was terrified,” Earle recalled. “I personally have never experienced that kind of fear. The look on her face has really stayed with me.”

content:textarea:44:23.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:44:23.html: Unfortunately, because the women’s shelter was full that day, the name of the woman Earle saw was added to a waiting list—a stark reminder of the very real and urgent needs faced by people in our region every day.
content:textarea:44:23.content: Unfortunately, because the women’s shelter was full that day, the name of the woman Earle saw was added to a waiting list—a stark reminder of the very real and urgent needs faced by people in our region every day.

content:textarea:45:22.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:45:22.html: That is one reason Earle firmly supports the Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign.
content:textarea:45:22.content: That is one reason Earle firmly supports the Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign.

content:textarea:46:45.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:46:45.html: “This campaign will provide a larger women’s and children’s shelter,” he said. “It will also create housing for men with children, who we currently cannot accommodate. The new Center of Hope will keep children off the street and make a lasting difference for families in our community.”
content:textarea:46:45.content: “This campaign will provide a larger women’s and children’s shelter,” he said. “It will also create housing for men with children, who we currently cannot accommodate. The new Center of Hope will keep children off the street and make a lasting difference for families in our community.”

content:text:50:49.html: Will You Answer the Call?

content:images:51:17.name: Image

content:text:52:47.name: Heading
content:text:52:47.html: “Ultimately, if your heart is to help people, it’s what we do. This building—and the countless lives it represents—is an amazing opportunity. You can help change eternities for countless people for many years to come.”
content:text:52:47.content: “Ultimately, if your heart is to help people, it’s what we do. This building—and the countless lives it represents—is an amazing opportunity. You can help change eternities for countless people for many years to come.”

content:text:57:55.name: Heading
content:text:57:55.html: At The Salvation Army Greenville County, we believe that rebuilding hope isn’t merely a mission— it’s a calling.
content:text:57:55.content: At The Salvation Army Greenville County, we believe that rebuilding hope isn’t merely a mission— it’s a calling.

content:textarea:58:96.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:58:96.html: For over a century, we have had the privilege of serving our region’s most vulnerable residents, helping thousands regain their footing and find their way forward.
content:textarea:58:96.content: For over a century, we have had the privilege of serving our region’s most vulnerable residents, helping thousands regain their footing and find their way forward.

content:textarea:59:12.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:59:12.html: However, our aging facilities are currently stretched beyond their capacity. Too often we are forced to turn people away—among them children, women, and veterans. Without options, many are left to seek refuge on the streets.
content:textarea:59:12.content: However, our aging facilities are currently stretched beyond their capacity. Too often we are forced to turn people away—among them children, women, and veterans. Without options, many are left to seek refuge on the streets.

content:textarea:60:19.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:60:19.html: Today, we want to change the narrative. Through the Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign, a $16 million initiative, we want to replace our five aging buildings with a new 45,000 square foot “Center of Hope”—a sanctuary where 143 people can experience the power of God’s love and support. It will be the only shelter in Greenville that can offer emergency shelter to entire families together. It will also improve security and help those struggling with physical disabilities.
content:textarea:60:19.content: Today, we want to change the narrative. Through the Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign, a $16 million initiative, we want to replace our five aging buildings with a new 45,000 square foot “Center of Hope”—a sanctuary where 143 people can experience the power of God’s love and support. It will be the only shelter in Greenville that can offer emergency shelter to entire families together. It will also improve security and help those struggling with physical disabilities.

content:textarea:61:77.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:61:77.html: Thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we’ve already raised over $14 million toward this goal. With just $2.5 million left to go, we’re closer than ever to bringing this vision to life.
content:textarea:61:77.content: Thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we’ve already raised over $14 million toward this goal. With just $2.5 million left to go, we’re closer than ever to bringing this vision to life.

content:text:63:60.content: Who We Serve: By the Numbers

content:textarea:80:81.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:80:81.html: The Salvation Army has served vulnerable neighbors in Greenville County for over 100 years. Today, the homeless population is rapidly increasing; however, our aging campus struggles to meet the demands. The current shelter campus comprises five separate buildings, which increases security risks for our participants and creates mobility issues for those with physical disabilities.
content:textarea:80:81.content: The Salvation Army has served vulnerable neighbors in Greenville County for over 100 years. Today, the homeless population is rapidly increasing; however, our aging campus struggles to meet the demands. The current shelter campus comprises five separate buildings, which increases security risks for our participants and creates mobility issues for those with physical disabilities.

content:textarea:81:38.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:81:38.html: Revitalizing the current campus will bring services under one roof, with corridors connecting the buildings—allowing us to serve more participants, safely and effectively.
content:textarea:81:38.content: Revitalizing the current campus will bring services under one roof, with corridors connecting the buildings—allowing us to serve more participants, safely and effectively.

content:textarea:82:49.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:82:49.html: The increase in the bed capacity will provide individuals and families a safe place to sleep where the environment restores dignity. The updated, purposeful design will also provide much-needed new family and transitional housing. This is vital to empowering independent living.
content:textarea:82:49.content: The increase in the bed capacity will provide individuals and families a safe place to sleep where the environment restores dignity. The updated, purposeful design will also provide much-needed new family and transitional housing. This is vital to empowering independent living.

content:textarea:83:49.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:83:49.html: Overall, the revitalized Social Service Shelter Campus will provide more space strategically configured to stabilize vulnerable individuals. Besides providing greater missional effectiveness, the “Center of Hope” will be a place where families and individuals can rebuild their lives in a place that inspires and encourages.
content:textarea:83:49.content: Overall, the revitalized Social Service Shelter Campus will provide more space strategically configured to stabilize vulnerable individuals. Besides providing greater missional effectiveness, the “Center of Hope” will be a place where families and individuals can rebuild their lives in a place that inspires and encourages.

content:images:84:13.name: Image
content:images:84:13.description: Reference to image ZUIDs in Zesty.io

content:textarea:88:51.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:88:51.html: Our Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign reflects our commitment to the vulnerable neighbors we serve.
content:textarea:88:51.content: Our Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign reflects our commitment to the vulnerable neighbors we serve.

content:textarea:89:33.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:89:33.html: The revitalized 45,000 square foot “Center of Hope” will provide greater security and cohesiveness. The new space will increase efficiency in daily operation, create greater security and accessibility, and allow for better engagement with our clients.
content:textarea:89:33.content: The revitalized 45,000 square foot “Center of Hope” will provide greater security and cohesiveness. The new space will increase efficiency in daily operation, create greater security and accessibility, and allow for better engagement with our clients.

content:text:91:44.name: Heading
content:text:91:44.html: The New Social Services Campus Will Include:
content:text:91:44.content: The New Social Services Campus Will Include:

content:wysiwyg_basic:92:62.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:92:62.html:
• Family Shelters to keep households together (men with children, couples with children)
  • Transitional Housing for those needing support for more time to become stable
  • Single occupancy rooms for those who have experienced trauma
  • Classroom for partner education programs and workshops
  • Computer lab to aid in job search and enhance computer skills
  • Library for residents to read their book of choice
  • Medical Respite for individuals facing homelessness in need of a space to convalesce
  • Day Shelter with showers and laundry facilities
  • Double the number of those served annually
content:wysiwyg_basic:92:62.content:
• Family Shelters to keep households together (men with children, couples with children)
  • Transitional Housing for those needing support for more time to become stable
  • Single occupancy rooms for those who have experienced trauma
  • Classroom for partner education programs and workshops
  • Computer lab to aid in job search and enhance computer skills
  • Library for residents to read their book of choice
  • Medical Respite for individuals facing homelessness in need of a space to convalesce
  • Day Shelter with showers and laundry facilities
  • Double the number of those served annually

content:textarea:94:24.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:94:24.html: Financial support from private donors, businesses, and foundations will enable The Salvation Army of Greenville County to adapt to the increasing demands.
content:textarea:94:24.content: Financial support from private donors, businesses, and foundations will enable The Salvation Army of Greenville County to adapt to the increasing demands.

content:textarea:95:24.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:95:24.html: “You cannot warm the hearts of people with God’s love if they have an empty stomach and cold feet.” -- William Booth, Founder and First General of The Salvation Army
content:textarea:95:24.content: “You cannot warm the hearts of people with God’s love if they have an empty stomach and cold feet.” -- William Booth, Founder and First General of The Salvation Army

content:textarea:96:19.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:96:19.html: In addition, a $2 million endowment will be established to sustain future operations for the Social Services campus.
content:textarea:96:19.content: In addition, a $2 million endowment will be established to sustain future operations for the Social Services campus.

content:textarea:119:64.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:119:64.html: “Dear children, let us not love with words or speech, but with actions and in truth.”—1 John 3:18
content:textarea:119:64.content: “Dear children, let us not love with words or speech, but with actions and in truth.”—1 John 3:18

content:textarea:120:88.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:120:88.html: The Salvation Army of Greenville County’s Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign will bring together community businesses, foundations, and private donors to accomplish this important redesign and expansion, improving services to our vulnerable neighbors.
content:textarea:120:88.content: The Salvation Army of Greenville County’s Rebuilding Hope Restoring Lives Campaign will bring together community businesses, foundations, and private donors to accomplish this important redesign and expansion, improving services to our vulnerable neighbors.

content:textarea:121:14.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:121:14.html: As of August 2025, we still need the required $4 million to begin construction. We welcome assistance from the Upstate community to reach our construction goal, and more importantly, give a helping hand to the underserved in rebuilding their lives.
content:textarea:121:14.content: As of August 2025, we still need the required $4 million to begin construction. We welcome assistance from the Upstate community to reach our construction goal, and more importantly, give a helping hand to the underserved in rebuilding their lives.

content:textarea:122:62.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:122:62.html: Please consider making a major gift, which will have a profound impact on those who rely on our services. Your generous donation will move us quickly toward achieving our goal.
content:textarea:122:62.content: Please consider making a major gift, which will have a profound impact on those who rely on our services. Your generous donation will move us quickly toward achieving our goal.
